_comment: Synthetic wave-tip package.json — declares the strict-only scripts the W1 repo-wide check gate requires. With the unfixed lint+typecheck offenders in this fixture, `pnpm -r lint`, `pnpm -r typecheck`, and (transitively) `pnpm -r test` all fail.
name: project-alpha-fixture

expected_wave_tip_state.test: NOT_RUN (typecheck failure short-circuits the suite; postmortem § 3.12 + fix-plan claim 7)
expected_wave_tip_state.live_publishers: task.events.ts / notification.events.ts / sse.events.ts exports defined; zero call sites in worker.ts / engine.ts
